plugins.name: fm-rcc
plugins.description: Agentic FileMaker development: one-verb-per-skill (calc language, scripting, XML wire format, Save-as-XML/DDR analysis, patch pipeline, turnkey direct OData + Data API connection tools, connection router, ProofKit, docs) plus BaseElements + MBS plugin reference; SaXML patching with verify/rollback; project scaffolding.
